creator: grahamperrin@freebsd.org
text:
<https://www.freebsd.org/cgi/man.cgi?query=bectl&sektion=8&manpath=FreeBSD> defaults to FreeBSD 13.1-RELEASE but lacks the detail that's present when the page is viewed in a terminal on 13.1-RELEASE. 

man 8 bectl

<https://github.com/freebsd/freebsd-src/commit/41e0b07a5e2a42cc2d6532ee529b6190bd14a69d?diff=split> (2022-04-06) was to releng/13.1.
